title: T-011 — operator_kpis_monthly materialized view + nightly refresh job
prompt:
# T-011 — operator_kpis_monthly materialized view

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.12, §11.3, §6 D11

## Goal
Create the operator_kpis_monthly materialized view per §9.12 SQL with unique index on (operator_id, month) and add a nightly refresh job (cron) that runs `REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY operator_kpis_monthly`.

## Implementation contract
Migration packages/db/migrations/NNNN_operator_kpis_monthly.sql: copy §9.12 SQL verbatim (operator_kpis_monthly aggregating wo_material_consumption + wo_waste_log), create UNIQUE INDEX idx_operator_kpis_unique. Add Vercel Cron route apps/web/app/api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis/route.ts (GET, secured by CRON_SECRET) that calls REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY. Add vercel.json crons entry triggering this route nightly at 02:00 UTC.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_operator_kpis_monthly.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis/route.ts [create]
- vercel.json [modify]
- apps/web/app/api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration applied, when SELECT * FROM operator_kpis_monthly runs, then row shape matches §9.12 columns (operator_id, month, fefo_compliance_pct, over_consumption_incidents, waste_attributed_kg)
2. Given GET /api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis with valid CRON_SECRET header, when called, then runs REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY and returns 200 with refreshed_at timestamp
3. Given GET /api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis without CRON_SECRET, when called, then returns 401

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/app/api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis/__tests__/route.test.ts asserting 401 without secret + 200 with secret + invokes REFRESH before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:migrate && pnpm --filter web test refresh-operator-kpis'

## Risk red lines
- Do not REFRESH non-CONCURRENTLY (locks reads) — UNIQUE index required for CONCURRENTLY
- Do not expose route without CRON_SECRET (RBAC bypass)
- Do not change view columns (downstream KPI consumers)

pipeline_inputs.description: operator_kpis_monthly materialized view + Vercel Cron nightly refresh route.
pipeline_inputs.details: Copy §9.12 SQL verbatim into a Drizzle migration. UNIQUE INDEX idx_operator_kpis_unique enables REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY. Route uses CRON_SECRET header check, calls REFRESH via raw SQL, returns refreshed_at. vercel.json cron schedule '0 2 * * *' UTC.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration applied, when SELECT runs, then row shape matches §9.12 columns
Given GET /api/cron/refresh-operator-kpis with valid CRON_SECRET, when called, then 200 with refreshed_at and REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY invoked
Given request without CRON_SECRET, when called, then 401
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting 401 without secret + 200 with secret invoking REFRESH before route exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:migrate && pnpm --filter web test refresh-operator-kpis'
risk_red_lines: Do not expose route without CRON_SECRET
